introduction.text: Seriously, have you got any idea what time it is?
What do you mean, 'Jeremy sent you'? I don't know any Jeremies.
Oh, right! Jerezmy! Jezza. Jez. Yeah, I know him, lovely fella, we go way back.
He got me this job directing the slapstick version of Anna Karenina, and I told him --
Yeah, that is what I told him. How did you know th-- ah. So Almighty Jez is calling in a favour, then.
Well, you might as well come in then. Let's see what I've got to work with, eh?
